scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n client,canvas,admin,server -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-client" "npm run dev:canvas-demo --workspace @trinitywar/game-client" "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-admin" "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-server"
scripts.dev:game: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n client,canvas,server -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-client" "npm run dev:canvas-demo --workspace @trinitywar/game-client" "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-server"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-server
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-client && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-admin && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-server
scripts.build:client: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-client
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-server
